description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark-colored gable roof and a light gray exterior. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a set of three tall, narrow windows flanked by two vertical shrubs, and a large multi-panel garage door to the right. The landscaping includes manicured hedges, several mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to the garage. The backyard is enclosed by hedges and contains a rectangular swimming pool, a paved patio area, and additional trees for privacy. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large panes providing ample natural light. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat gable roof, large windows, a prominent garage, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a pool and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, three tall windows, garage door, and manicured landscaping with vertical shrubs and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage extension, a single window, paved driveway, and the backyard pool area with surrounding trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio, symmetrical window arrangement, and privacy hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a smaller window, the side of the garage, and additional trees and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a set of three tall, narrow windows, flanked by vertical shrubs, no porch, and a simple overhang.
